sourceRoot: local OC and CX donor checkouts

coverage: plugin MCP servers are scoped under plugin:<plugin>:<server>
plugin/user/env templates are resolved before registration
missing user config or environment variables omit affected servers and report mcp issues
stdio plugin MCP servers receive reserved AgenC plugin environment variables
reserved plugin environment variables override manifest attempts to redefine them
stdio working directories default to the plugin root and remain contained after template substitution
plugin MCP server spawn paths are represented as isolated stdio child-process configs
child-process isolation metadata is attached to registered plugin MCP server configs
remote MCP transports are classified as remote and do not receive stdio child-process metadata
plugin MCP manifests accept stdio, SSE, HTTP, websocket, and ws transport selectors
websocket and ws plugin MCP servers normalize into runtime-supported MCP config
